title: Budding Nether Quartz
description: Adds renewable amethyst-like versions of Nether Quartz.
body: A small Minecraft mod that adds budding block and cluster versions of Nether Quartz in a similar fashion to Amethyst. Designed primarily as a companion to Applied Energistics 2 to provide a counterpart for Certus Quartz, but made to work independently and standalone if so desired.
